sections.paragraph:
m. with suff. סִפִּי pr. an expansion, spreading out (from the root סָפַף); hence-

(1) a basin, bowl, Exo 12:22 Zec 12:2 pl. ־ִים Jer 52:19, and ֹות 1Ki 7:50.

(2) sill, threshold (Syr. ܣܦܶܐܳ atrium), Jud. 19:27 2Ki 12:10. (Ch. and Samar. id.).

(3) [Saph], pr.n. m. 2Sa 21:18, for which there is 1Ch 20:4, סִפַּי.
